zh.Over Kellet, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾奧維 凱萊特
zh.lifeSummary: 當de Kellet於大約1228年出生在英國藍卡爾奧維 凱萊特時，她的父親Adam de Kellet25歲，母親Mathilda de Singleton21歲。她於大約1245年與Sir Thurstan de Holand結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1260年在英國藍卡爾武普 霍蘭享年34歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当de Kellet于大约1228年出生在英国藍卡爾奧維 凱萊特时，她的父亲Adam de Kellet25岁，母亲Mathilda de Singleton21岁。她于大约1245年与Sir Thurstan de Holand结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1260年在英国藍卡爾武普 霍蘭享年34岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kellet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Kellett
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Nether or Over Kellet in Lancashire or Kelleth in Cumbria, named from Old Norse kelda ‘spring’ + hlíth ‘slope’.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When de Kellet was born about 1228, in Over Kellet, Lancashire, England, her father, Adam de Kellet, was 25 and her mother, Mathilda de Singleton, was 21. She married Sir Thurstan de Holand about 1245. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1260, in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, at the age of 34, and was buried in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque de Kellet est née environ 1228, à Over Kellet, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Adam de Kellet, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mathilda de Singleton, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thurstan de Holand environ 1245. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1260, à Up Holland, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Of, Upholland, Lancaster, England: Up Holland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als de Kellet um 1228 in Over Kellet, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam de Kellet 25 und ihre Mutter Mathilda de Singleton 21. Sie hat um 1245 Sir Thurstan de Holand geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1260 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Up Holland, Lancashire, England und wurde in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando de Kellet è nata il circa 1228 nel Over Kellet, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Adam de Kellet, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Mathilda de Singleton, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thurstan de Holand circa 1245. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1260, nel Up Holland, Lancashire, England, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a Preston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: de Kelletが約1228年にイギリスランカシュアイアオバー ケレットで生まれた時，父Adam de Kelletは25歳，母Mathilda de Singletonは21歳であった。約1245年にSir Thurstan de Holandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1260年にイギリスランカシュアイアウップ ホーランドで34歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: de Kellet(이)가 대략 1228년 영국 랭카실르 버 켈렛에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam de Kellet(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilda de Singleton(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1245년 Sir Thurstan de Holand(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1260년 영국 랭카실르 업 홀랜드에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 플레스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando de Kellet nasceu aproximadamente 1228, em Over Kellet, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam de Kellet, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mathilda de Singleton, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thurstan de Holand aproximadamente 1245. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1260, em Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Of, Upholland, Lancaster, England: Up Holland, Lancashire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда de Kellet родилась около 1228 г. в местности овир келлет, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Adam de Kellet было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilda de Singleton, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thurstan de Holand около 1245 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1260 г. в местности уп холланд, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando de Kellet nació aproximadamente 1228, en Over Kellet, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam de Kellet, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mathilda de Singleton, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir Thurstan de Holand aproximadamente 1245. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1260, en Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultada en Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
